name: faah-faah-error-sound
description: Plays a funny sound when editor diagnostics or terminal commands fail.

faahSound.enableEditorDiagnostics.description: Play sound when new editor errors appear or increase.

faahSound.enableTerminalFailures.description: Play sound when a terminal command exits with a non-zero code.

faahSound.soundPath.description: Optional absolute path to an MP3 file or folder. If folder, a random MP3 is selected.

faahSound.editorSoundPath.description: Optional absolute path to an MP3 file or folder for editor diagnostics.

faahSound.terminalSoundPath.description: Optional absolute path to an MP3 file or folder for terminal failures.

faahSound.combineClipCount.description: Number of short MP3 clips to chain together for each trigger.
